smooth.desc: float / cast sheet -- essentially flat, only faint sub-mm imperfection

hammered.desc: isotropic mm-scale pebbled cells (classic cathedral glass)

granite.desc: dense fine stipple / granite tooth (rolled dark & textured sheet)

seedy.desc: sparse discrete round bumps / seeds / small bubbles on a soft ground

ripple.desc: directional pulled / reeded streaks (streaky & waterglass sheet)

rolling_wave.desc: coarse cm-scale rolling waves (baroque / hammered-coarse sheet)

grounding: generate_synthetic.generate_relief_height families + real sheet-glass corpus classes
